title: WaterDeprivationElementResult
description: WaterDeprivationElementResult: Result class for resulting Water Deprivation for a particular Element.

A1.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Raw Material Supply module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

A2.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Transport module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

A3.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Manufacturing module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

A1toA3.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the full Product stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

A4.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Transport module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

A5.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Construction Installation Process module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B1.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B2.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Maintenance module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B3.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Repair module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B4.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Replacement module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B5.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Refurbishment module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B6.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Operational Energy Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B7.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Operational Water Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

B1toB7.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the full Use Stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

C1.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the De-construction Demolition module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

C2.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Transport module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

C3.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Waste Processing module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

C4.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the Disposal module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

C1toC4.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to the full End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

D.description: Resulting Water Deprivation relating to benefits and loads beyond the system boundary. Property has a quantity of type Volume measured in [m³].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
